*** 1 Inj *** A NWS storm survey has confirmed a microburst occurred near Shoreham, VT with estimated maximum winds of 85 mph. Between 50 and 75 large trees were found snapped and uprooted with some structural damage including metal roofing and siding damage. One minor injury occurred due to an individual being hit with flying debris.
